questions.question: Describe the main purpose of a digital certificate in public-key management. (5 marks)
questions.hint: A digital certificate plays a crucial role in establishing the authenticity of a public key.

questions.question: What is the main difference between a Certificate Authority (CA) and a Registration Authority (RA)? (5 marks)
questions.hint: A CA is responsible for issuing digital certificates, while an RA verifies the identity of applicants seeking certificates.

questions.question: What is the Certificate Lifecycle? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the stages of a digital certificate's life cycle, including issuance, deployment, use, revocation, and renewal.
